title: Tutorial 04: Session Keys — Autonomous Agent (Next.js + Firebase)
body:
**May** — Session keys are our competitive advantage. No other wallet infra lets an app execute transactions without asking the user every single time. This is what makes Vela possible — an AI agent that trades for you while you sleep. You're also testing Firebase auth for the first time (tutorials 01-03 used Clerk). Every auth provider we validate = more developers we can serve. If Firebase setup docs have a bug, you're the one who catches it.

## Framework: Next.js (App Router)
## Auth Provider: Firebase

## Docs pages to follow (in order)

1. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/gasless-quickstart
2. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/gasless-firebase-setup
3. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/guides/session-keys
4. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/hooks/use-create-wallet
5. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/hooks/use-create-session-key
6. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/hooks/use-add-session-key-to-contract
7. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/hooks/use-execute-with-session
8. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/hooks/use-revoke-session-key
9. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/hooks/use-get-session-data
10. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/hooks/use-chipi-session

## Features to test

- [ ] Sign in with Firebase (Google Sign-In or email/password)
- [ ] Create wallet
- [ ] Create a session key with spending limits
- [ ] Add session key to the wallet contract
- [ ] Execute a transfer using session key (no user prompt!)
- [ ] View session data (status, expiry, permissions)
- [ ] Revoke a session key
- [ ] Verify revoked session can't execute

## Hooks to exercise

- `useCreateWallet` (same as 01)
- `useCreateSessionKey`
- `useAddSessionKeyToContract`
- `useExecuteWithSession`
- `useRevokeSessionKey`
- `useGetSessionData`
- `useChipiSession`

## When something doesn't work

Same process. File in correct repo. Link here.

## Deliverables

- [ ] Working project in `tutorials/04-session-keys/`
- [ ] Clean clone works
- [ ] `VALIDATION.md` with pass/fail
- [ ] Every hook above used in code
- [ ] Recording: 5-8 min. With session keys, you could build an autonomous DeFi agent like Vela, a subscription service, or a gaming bot that acts on your behalf — comment **session-architect** to unlock your next tutorial
- [ ] All bugs filed
- [ ] YouTube video link in PR description

## Use case ideas (mention in your recording)

- Autonomous DeFi agent that rebalances your portfolio (like Vela)
- Subscription service with recurring auto-payments
- Gaming bot that makes in-game purchases without approval each time

## Your impact

Session keys = the Chipi AI API revenue model. This tutorial validates the core monetization feature.
